en: I slot-bet Marshall that you did porn, so I win.
ko: 나는 마샬에게 네가 포르노를 찍었다고 내기를 걸었고, 그래서 나는 포르노를 이겼어.

en: Porn? I wish it was porn. It would be less embarrassing.
I know. How about I sing you a song?
Let's go to the mall, everybody.
Go! Come on, Jessica. Come on, Tori.
I was a teenage pop star in Canada.
Please, put on your jelly bracelet and your cool graffiti coat.
At the mall, having fun is what it's all about.
This is the most amazing thing I've ever seen.
ko: 내가 본 것 중 가장 놀라운 일이야.

en: That's you? Yes. I had one minor hit.
I had to go all over Canada and sing this song in malls.
ko: 캐나다 전역을 돌아다니며 쇼핑몰에서 이 노래를 불렀어.

en: For a whole year, I lived off of Orange Julius' and Wetzel's pretzels.
ko: 1년 내내. 나는 오렌지 줄리어스와 웨첼의 프레첼로 생활했어.
